items.title: Nanjing Shangzhi Emergence Technology Co., Ltd. Established
items.summary: Nanjing Shangzhi Emergence Technology Co., Ltd. has been established, focusing on voice intelligence to provide AI vertical services.
items.content: We are thrilled to announce the official establishment of Nanjing Shangzhi Emergence Technology Co., Ltd.! The company will focus on the field of voice intelligence, dedicated to providing the industry with cutting-edge AI vertical service solutions.
